meta.title: The F-22 is getting a billion-dollar engine upgrade #f22 #f22raptor
meta.description:
Pratt and Whitney were awarded $1.5 billion to update the F-22 Raptor's F119 afterburning turbofan engines for more power, more reliability, and less down time. 

Subscribe to Sandboxx News to stay on top of all things defense tech!
